design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.before: throw new RuntimeException(String.format("%sV - Power source is questionable to charge the laptop",volts.getVolts()));
design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.after: throw new RuntimeException("%sV - Power source is questionable to charge the laptop".formatted(volts.getVolts()));
